filesystem.description: Read/write project files. Replaces custom file I/O code.

git.description: Full git operations: commits, branches, diffs, log, blame.

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph. Store facts, decisions, context across sessions.

fetch.description: HTTP GET any URL. Replaces writing custom fetch code for APIs and web content.

sequential-thinking.description: Dynamic step-by-step reasoning for complex multi-part problems.

context7.description: Get accurate, current library documentation. Use before any library-specific code.

playwright.description: Browser automation for testing and web scraping.

brave-search.description: Web search. Use for current information, research, finding solutions.

github.description: GitHub API: repos, issues, PRs, files, search. Use for GitHub-related tasks.

supabase.description: Supabase operations: DB queries, schema management, auth, storage.

_instructions.reason: Each MCP server description consumes tokens. More than 10 can reduce your 200k context window to ~70k.
_instructions.disable_unused: Set disabledMcpServers in project config for servers not needed in current project.
_instructions.add_new_server: Add project-specific servers to this file. Reference in PRE_START_CHECKLIST Phase 6.

optional_servers.exa: npx -y exa-mcp-server — neural web search (better than brave for research)
optional_servers.firecrawl: npx -y firecrawl-mcp — web scraping with AI-friendly output
optional_servers.resend: npx -y resend-mcp — email sending via Resend API
optional_servers.cloudflare: npx -y @cloudflare/mcp-server-cloudflare — Cloudflare Workers, KV, D1, R2
